title: dryopteris rufa
intro: Dryopteris rufa, also known as the autumn fern or copper fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris rufa include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, analgesic, and anti-inflammatory properties. Dryopteris rufa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
